instruction:
## Choose the Next Feature to Build

Workspace: `C:\Users\MSI\Desktop\WinCoding\jobScrap\job-war-room`

**Steps:**

1. Read the following files in order:
   - `EVOLUTION_BACKLOG.md` (if it exists) — the prioritized improvement list
   - `EVOLUTION_LOG.md` (if it exists) — history of what has been built
   - Last 5 entries in `ops_log.md` — recent operational pain points

2. From this data, choose exactly **ONE** specific, concrete improvement to implement. Prefer:
   - The top `HIGH` priority item in EVOLUTION_BACKLOG (if present)
   - Otherwise, the most recurring issue in ops_log analysis sections
   - Otherwise, one of: retry logic for scraping failures / title-based deduplication / Slack/webhook alert channel / new keyword category (robotics, quant_finance, etc.)

3. Write `SPRINT_DECISION.md` with this exact structure:
   ```markdown
   # Sprint Decision
   ## Chosen Improvement
   <one sentence describing exactly what to build>

   ## Why
   <cite specific evidence from ops_log or backlog>

   ## Files to Change
   - <file1.py>: <what changes>
   - <file2.py>: <what changes>

   ## Acceptance Criteria
   - [ ] <concrete, testable criterion 1>
   - [ ] <concrete, testable criterion 2>
   - [ ] <concrete, testable criterion 3>

   ## Branch Name
   feat/<short-kebab-topic>
   ```

4. Do not create the branch yet — that happens in the next card.
